title: Master Domain Decomposition
description: Apply Bounded Contexts to decompose complex domains into stable service perimeters. Design service boundaries that prevent tight coupling, avoiding the 'Distributed Monolith' anti-pattern. Evaluate the impact of shared databases on service independence and identify strategies to mitigate coupling.
objectives: Apply Bounded Contexts to decompose complex domains into stable service perimeters.
Design service boundaries that prevent tight coupling, avoiding the 'Distributed Monolith' anti-pattern.
